tasks.subject: T0: Parser, size, and state helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement parse_size, parse_line, load_work_list, and BatchState in tools/stash_crawls_batch.py. Ships 6 unit tests.

**Files:**
- Create: tools/stash_crawls_batch.py
- Create: tools/test_stash_crawls_batch.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- parse_size handles K/M/G/T units + decimal sizes
- parse_line returns None for blank/marker/malformed lines
- load_work_list raises FatalError on duplicate IDs, filters done set, sorts ascending
- BatchState.append writes per-class state files; done entries also update in-memory set
- BatchState loads existing stash_done.txt into done set
- 6 unit tests pass: parse_size_units, parse_line_skips_markers, parse_line_handles_blank_and_malformed, load_work_list_rejects_duplicates, load_work_list_filters_done_and_sorts, batch_state_append_done_and_classes, batch_state_loads_existing_done

**Verify:** pytest tools/test_stash_crawls_batch.py -v -k "parse or batch_state or load_work_list" → 6 PASS

**Steps:** TDD — write 6 failing tests, run (confirm fail), implement parser + state, run (confirm 6 pass), commit with bilingual EN+FR message.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/stash_crawls_batch.py", "tools/test_stash_crawls_batch.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tools/test_stash_crawls_batch.py -v -k 'parse or batch_state or load_work_list'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parse_size handles K/M/G/T with decimals", "parse_line drops blanks/markers/malformed", "load_work_list raises on duplicates", "load_work_list filters done + sorts ascending", "BatchState append writes per-class files", "BatchState loads existing done.txt", "6 unit tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: T1: Disk guard, timeout, and existence checks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add per_crawl_timeout, local_tar_exists, dead_letter_exists, gcs_tar_exists, and wait_for_disk helpers to tools/stash_crawls_batch.py. Ships 3 unit tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: tools/stash_crawls_batch.py (append after BatchState)
- Modify: tools/test_stash_crawls_batch.py (append 3 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- per_crawl_timeout: floor 10 min, ceiling 60 min, 3 min/GB middle
- local_tar_exists/dead_letter_exists: os.path probes on <dir>/<id>.tar.gz
- gcs_tar_exists: gcloud storage ls returncode==0
- wait_for_disk: passes when free ≥ needed + 10 GB, raises FatalError after DISK_WAIT_MAX_SECONDS
- 3 unit tests pass: per_crawl_timeout_formula, disk_guard_waits_then_passes, disk_guard_aborts_on_timeout

**Verify:** pytest tools/test_stash_crawls_batch.py -v → 9 PASS (6 from T0 + 3 new)

**Steps:** TDD — append 3 failing tests, run (confirm fail), append helpers (per_crawl_timeout, existence checks, wait_for_disk), run (confirm 9 pass), commit with bilingual EN+FR message.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/stash_crawls_batch.py", "tools/test_stash_crawls_batch.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tools/test_stash_crawls_batch.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["per_crawl_timeout 10-60min 3min/GB", "local/dead_letter/gcs existence checks correct", "wait_for_disk waits then passes when free OK", "wait_for_disk aborts on timeout", "9 unit tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: T2: HTTP post + per-crawl process loop + signals
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement Config dataclass, http_post (urllib.request, stdlib only), process_crawl, and install_signal_handlers in tools/stash_crawls_batch.py.

**Files:**
- Modify: tools/stash_crawls_batch.py (append after wait_for_disk)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Config frozen dataclass with 8 fields matching env-driven knobs
- http_post returns HttpResponse with status_code + text, captures HTTPError as response (no raise on 4xx/5xx)
- process_crawl: wait_for_disk → http_post → parse 202/400/404/409/5xx per spec → poll for local-absent + GCS-present, abort on dead-letter, abort on timeout
- 5xx retries once after 30s then aborts
- install_signal_handlers registers SIGINT/SIGTERM to set _stop_requested flag; process_crawl checks flag between polls

**Verify:** python -c "from tools.stash_crawls_batch import install_signal_handlers, process_crawl, Config, http_post; print('ok')" → prints "ok"; AND pytest tools/test_stash_crawls_batch.py -v → still 9 PASS

**Steps:** Append code (Config, http_post, process_crawl, install_signal_handlers), verify import + no test regression, commit with bilingual EN+FR message. No new unit tests at this layer.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/stash_crawls_batch.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -c \"from tools.stash_crawls_batch import install_signal_handlers, process_crawl, Config, http_post; print('ok')\" && pytest tools/test_stash_crawls_batch.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Config frozen dataclass 8 fields", "http_post stdlib only handles 4xx/5xx as response", "process_crawl pipeline matches spec", "5xx retry-once-then-abort", "signal handlers SIGINT/SIGTERM clean exit", "no test regression"]}
```

tasks.subject: T3: CLI entry + dry-run + summary
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire up main(), argparse, env-driven Config builder, dry-run renderer, real-run loop, and per-class summary in tools/stash_crawls_batch.py. Validate via manual smoke.

**Files:**
- Modify: tools/stash_crawls_batch.py (append print_dry_run, print_summary, _build_config_from_env, _configure_logging, main, __main__ guard)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- python tools/stash_crawls_batch.py --help shows usage with <input-file> positional + --dry-run flag
- Missing STASH_GCS_BUCKET → exit 2, stderr "STASH_GCS_BUCKET environment variable is required"
- --dry-run prints parsed plan (skipped count, resume count, ordered work list with per-crawl timeouts, config summary, disk free), no HTTP/gcloud calls
- Real run iterates work list calling process_crawl, catches FatalError to print summary + exit 1, exit 0 on full success
- Summary block printed on any exit (success, fatal, signal): per-class counts + elapsed
- Logger dual to stdout AND <input>.stash_run.log

**Verify:** Acceptance checks A (--help → exit 0), B (missing bucket → exit 2 + stderr msg), C (--dry-run on 3-line fixture → exit 0 plan printed); AND pytest tools/test_stash_crawls_batch.py -v → 9 PASS.

**Manual smoke** (post-merge, server VM): operator creates temp/smoke.txt with 6271+6299, exports env, runs script, verifies stash_done.txt + GCS objects.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/stash_crawls_batch.py"], "verifyCommand": "python tools/stash_crawls_batch.py --help && STASH_GCS_BUCKET=fake python tools/stash_crawls_batch.py /tmp/smoke.txt --dry-run && pytest tools/test_stash_crawls_batch.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--help shows usage", "missing bucket exit 2 + stderr msg", "--dry-run prints plan no side effects", "real run loops process_crawl + handles FatalError", "summary printed on any exit", "logger dual stdout + file", "9 unit tests pass"]}
```
